---
title: "paragraph"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Across both April and October, only one site displayed a significant
trend of water temperature across years. In both months, the GLM coefficients
of sites 14166000 and 14211010 were all above the significance threshold
of 0.1. Site 1421170 had a p-value under 0.1 during October only. There was
evidence of a positive trend (0.05 degrees per year) in October water 
temperature across years at that site. Site 11421170 was the warmest on average
across both April and October. Water temperatures were consistently warmer
in October than April.
